active_projects.completion_summary: Ported /deck command-skill-agent system from Typst to Slidev with reusable library at .context/deck/ containing 52 indexed entries (themes, patterns, animations, styles, content, components). Rewrote planner for 5-step library-aware workflow, builder for library-based assembly, deleted 7 obsolete Typst files.

active_projects.completion_summary: Moved 53-file deck library from .context/deck/ to founder extension seed directory, added initialization guards to deck-planner-agent and deck-builder-agent, updated index registration from .context/index.json to extension index-entries.json, removed original .context/deck/.
